name: Western Beef and Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to moderate (325 degrees F).
2. Cut the olives into large pieces.
3. Brown the beef in the oil. Drain excess fat and remove the meat from the pan, adding a little fresh oil.
4. Add the onion, celery, green pepper, and rice. Cook, stirring until browned.
5. Add the tomatoes, water, seasonings (salt, chili powder, pepper, Worcestershire sauce), meat, and olives. Bring to a boil.
6. Pour into a two-quart casserole dish and cover.
7. Bake for forty-five minutes to one hour.
